name: lingcang
description: LingCang is a multi-account workspace browser for isolated creator sessions.

scripts.package:mac: pnpm run build:ts && pnpm run build:css && pnpm run prepare:package && electron-packager .package LingCang --platform=darwin --arch=x64 --out=release --overwrite --asar --prune=true --app-bundle-id=com.lingcang.browser --app-version=$npm_package_version --executable-name=LingCang && pnpm run prune:mac && ditto -c -k --sequesterRsrc --keepParent release/LingCang-darwin-x64/LingCang.app release/LingCang-darwin-x64.zip && rm -rf .package
scripts.landing:build: mkdir -p public && cp assets/app-logo.svg public/app-logo.svg && cp landing/index.html public/index.html
scripts.start: pnpm run build:ts && pnpm run build:css && electron .
